| **Technical integration** | engineering@quantoryn.com | API technical questions, OAuth implementation, webhook configuration, data format clarifications |

---

## API partnership request process

To request API access for integration with Quantoryn:

1. **Email**: partnerships@quantoryn.com
2. **Subject line**: `API Partnership Request — [Provider Name]`
3. **Include**:
   - Provider name and product description
   - API or SDK you are offering access to
   - Data types available (activity summaries, streams, webhooks, workout push)
   - Any existing partner programme documentation or application form

We will respond within 3 business days with next steps.

---

## Technical documentation provided

When contacting for an API integration review, we can provide:

| Document | Content |
|---|---|
| `quantoryn-overview.md` | Platform philosophy, architecture, and principles |
| `integration-architecture.md` | End-to-end integration flow, provider isolation model |
| `data-handling.md` | OAuth lifecycle, webhook ingestion, retention, security controls |
| `vendor_data_access_spec.md` | Per-sport data requirements, Required vs Optional fields, stream justification |
| `privacy-policy.md` | Full privacy policy and data subject rights |
| `terms-of-service.md` | Platform usage terms |
| `docs/compliance/security_policy.md` | Security contact, vulnerability disclosure, tenant isolation |

---

## Security disclosure

To report a security vulnerability:

**Email**: security@quantoryn.com
**Subject**: `[SECURITY] <brief description>`

Please do not open a public issue for security concerns.

We follow coordinated responsible disclosure:

- Acknowledgement within 48 hours
- Triage and severity assessment within 5 business days
- Critical/High fix deployment within 30 days
- Researcher credit on fix deployment (if desired)

Full disclosure policy: `docs/compliance/security_policy.md`

---

## Response time expectations

| Request type | Expected first response |
|---|---|
| Partnership enquiry | 3 business days |
| Technical API question | 2 business days |
| Security disclosure | 48 hours |
| Privacy / data request | 48 hours |
| Data deletion request | 48 hours (completion within 30 days) |
